MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kristina Wertz for Plaintiff and moving party William W. Whitefield

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff William Whitefield's motion to quash or modify deposition subpoenas is granted in part. As to the medical records of Marilyn Kutzscher M.D. and Norman Postone M.D. the subpoena is modified to only require production of notes, charts, diagnostic records, prescription records, test or laboratory results, billings and correspondence from January 1, 2000 to the present. As to the employment records of Chevron Real Estate Management, Madsen Personnel, Lou's Pier 47, Bank of California, and The Headquarters Companies, the subpoenas are modified to only require production of records indicating plaintiff's dates of employment and salary and job description. Any other information shall be redacted.

The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order that provides for the confidentiality of the specified information. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Set For Trial On Aug-28-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-10-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303
